title: Second-file smoke test idea
one_liner: A deliberately separate JSON-file idea used to confirm Idea Forge reads every JSON file in /data.
problem: A local-first prototype can accidentally read only the first seed file.
solution: Keep one visible smoke-test idea in ideas2.json so the grid proves multi-file loading works.
uniqueness: It is intentionally boring and operational.
ai_role: AI has no special role here beyond helping verify the loader.
swot_strength: Makes the data loading behavior obvious.
swot_opportunity: Can later become an import test fixture.
swot_threat: Should not be mistaken for a serious shortlisted idea.
rejection_reason: Test fixture, not an actual idea.
revival_strategy: Remove or replace once multi-file imports are covered by tests.
